T0566.title: Landing Page Hijacking
T0566.definition: A tactic that diverts or manipulates landing pages to capture traffic, credentials, conversions, or commissions.
T0566.description: Landing Page Hijacking is used to identify related risks, abuse patterns, control requirements, and operational signals in BREAK business-security analysis.
T0566.usageExample: Assess Landing Page Hijacking related exposure and define the corresponding controls.
